title: T-041 — Scanner login endpoint (username + PIN)
prompt:
# T-041 — Scanner login endpoint

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §13.3 (FR-WH-027), V-WH-SCAN-001/004.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
`POST /api/warehouse/scanner/login` accepting {username, pin} and returning {session_token, expires_at}. PIN bcrypt-hashed in `users.scanner_pin_hash`. 5-fail rate limit per username.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/login/route.ts`. Validate PIN against bcrypt hash; on success issue HMAC-signed token (TTL = warehouse_settings.scanner_idle_timeout_sec, default 300s); insert `scanner_sessions` row. Track failures in `scanner_login_attempts`; lockout 10min after 5 fails. Add migration for `users.scanner_pin_hash` column if not yet present, plus the two new tables.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/login/route.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/scanner-sessions.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/scanner-login-attempts.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0NN_scanner_auth.sql [create]
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/login/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given valid {username, pin}, when endpoint is hit, then 200 with session_token and expires_at; row exists in scanner_sessions.
2. Given a wrong PIN 5 times in a row, when 6th attempt occurs, then 429 returns with V-WH-SCAN-004 lockout reason.
3. Given an issued token, when `validateScannerSession(token)` runs >TTL after issue, then it returns expired=true.

## Test strategy
- RED: route.test.ts covers happy login, lockout, TTL expiry.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test scanner-login`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not store PIN in plaintext.
- Do not skip lockout.
- Do not reuse the password column.

pipeline_inputs.description: Scanner login (username + PIN) with HMAC token, lockout, and session table.
pipeline_inputs.details: bcrypt PIN hash; HMAC token w/ TTL; 5-fail lockout 10min; scanner_sessions + scanner_login_attempts tables.
acceptance_criteria: Given valid username+pin, when endpoint is hit, then 200 with session_token and a scanner_sessions row exists
Given a wrong PIN 5 times, when 6th attempt occurs, then 429 returns with V-WH-SCAN-004 lockout
Given an issued token validated >TTL after issue, when validateScannerSession runs, then expired=true
test_strategy: RED: route.test.ts covers happy, lockout, expiry
